query:
-- Remover os 10 jogadores não fornecidos (mantendo J. Gadou id:30042)
DELETE FROM players WHERE id IN (
  90018, -- Yerlan Orazov (Ukrainian Premier League)
  90032, -- Sverre Nypan (Eliteserien)
  69,    -- M. Ndiaye (Eliteserien)
  90114, -- Kang Sang Yoon (K League 1)
  90125, -- A. Kozubal (Ekstraklasa)
  90105, -- V. Carboni (Liga Profesional)
  60046, -- M. Del Blanco (Liga Argentina)
  90107, -- P. Mercado (Liga Pro)
  76,    -- C. Brady (MLS)
  60036  -- C. Donovan (Scottish Premiership)
);

-- Verificar dados de Cambiaso, Schick e Nkunku
SELECT id, name, position, altPositions, club, league, nationality, overall, potential, age, imageUrl
FROM players
WHERE name LIKE '%Cambia%' OR name LIKE '%Schick%' OR name LIKE '%Nkunku%'
ORDER BY name;
